videoSnippet.title: He is The One! || Magnus vs Praggnanandhaa || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2840) - Praggnanandhaa R (2733) 
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [15] 2026.06.02
C02 French, advance, Paulsen attack

1.e4 e6 2.d4 d5 3.e5 c5 4.c3 Nc6 5.Nf3 Nh6 6.Na3 cxd4 7.cxd4 f6 8.exf6 Qxf6 9.Bd3 Bb4+ 10.Bd2 Bxa3 11.bxa3 Nxd4 12.Nxd4 Qxd4 13.Bxh6 Qc3+ 14.Kf1 gxh6 15.Rc1 Qe5 16.g3 Bd7 17.Kg2 O-O 18.Re1 Qg7 19.Rc7 Rf7 20.f4 Raf8 21.Kh1 Be8 22.Rxf7 Bxf7 23.Qc2 Bh5 24.Kg2 Rxf4 25.Qc8+ Rf8 26.Qxe6+ Kh8 27.Rf1 Rxf1 28.Bxf1 Bf7 29.Qc8+ Bg8 30.Qb8 Qb2+ 31.Kh3 Kg7 32.Qc7+ Bf7 33.Bd3 Qb6 34.Qe5+ Qf6 35.Qc7 b6 36.a4 h5 37.a5 Qe6+ 38.Kg2 Qe3 39.axb6 axb6 40.Bc2 h6 41.h4 b5 42.Bb3 Qe4+ 43.Kf2 b4 44.Qd6 Qd4+ 45.Ke2 Qb2+ 46.Kd3 Bg6+ 47.Ke3 Qc3+ 48.Kf4 Qd4+ 49.Kf3 Qd3+ 50.Kf2 Qd2+
